{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Group Strategy & Risk Management Manager",
  "description": "Bridgemead Consulting is a holistic and innovative business consultancy that believes in connecting businesses with the right individuals. We take pride in not just connecting clients to skilled talent but also ensuring we provide personalised solutions to all Human Resource challenges.

At Bridgemead we offer professional and unique Human Resources solutions to facilitate specific business requirements, enabling you focus solely on your business. We are a fully outsourced platform for Small Medium Enterprises (SME&rsquo;s) and our services span the full spectrum of all HR relayed business priorities. All our experts are CIPM, CIPD, SPHRI qualified with vast experience of real &ndash; life business processes.

Our team of dedicated professionals guarantee efficient, attainable and effective results that will positively transform your business processes internally and externally irrespective of size.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Group Strategy &amp; Risk Management Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports To: GMD
Department: Risk

Job brief


	This position will be responsible for formulating and implementing the company&rsquo;s strategic policies, risk management and mitigation and system audit and control.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop, execute and manage the system operating plan with the company strategic plan and ensure that goals are achieved.
	Develop innovative risk assessment methodologies to evaluate business risks from external causes and internal exposures and process inefficiencies.
	Create, implement and monitor strategies for risk mitigation in all areas of the business.
	Ensure a uniform and coordinated approach to risk assessments by providing guidance documents and facilitating assessments by business units.
	Facilitate implementation of strategies to address identified risks through development and revisions of policies, procedures and work instructions and by convening and serving on ad hoc and task-specific teams.
	Support business continuity and resilience planning initiatives.
	Oversee the internal control environment and review all independent assurance activity by the auditor.
	Maintain Group-wide risk registers and enterprise risk dashboards.
	Ensure that appropriate metrics are in place to measure performance and ensure that strategic actions are completed at various levels to achieve desired results and objectives.
	Manage and steward the Integrated Opportunity and Risk Management (ORM) program providing regular revisions and updates as necessary.
	Build out and steward the development and management of all operative unit&rsquo;s business resumption plans.
	Drive a culture of risk awareness, accountability and execution discipline.
	Champion continuous improvement across strategy and risk management practices.
	Responsible for conducting various risk assessments to identify potential threats and weaknesses, and develop contingency plans to address them.


Qualifications /Key competence


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Economics, Finance, Business Administration, Accounting, Risk Management or related disciplines
	9+ years of relevant experience in risk management, corporate strategy, consulting, financial services or related environment.
	Master&rsquo;s degree (MBA or related field) preferred.
	Experience within banking, investment management, asset management or diversified financial services preferred.
	Demonstrated experience in enterprise risk, strategy formulation and performance management.
	Experience preparing executive/board-level reports.


Certifications:


	Global Association of Risk Professionals (FRM)
	Chartered Financial Analyst Institute (CFA &ndash; added advantage)
	Relevant governance or strategy certifications are an advantage.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;career.bridgemeadnghr@gmail.com&nbsp;using&nbsp;&quot;Group Strategy &amp; Risk Management Manager&quot; as the subject of the mail.",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-02",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-11",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Bridgemead HR. and Advisory"
    
  },

Group Strategy & Risk Management Manager Job at Bridgemead Consulting




        
    

        
        Bridgemead Consulting is a holistic and innovative business consultancy that believes in connecting businesses with the right individuals. We take pride in not just connecting clients to skilled talent but also ensuring we provide personalised solutions to all Human Resource challenges.

At Bridgemead we offer professional and unique Human Resources solutions to facilitate specific business requirements, enabling you focus solely on your business. We are a fully outsourced platform for Small Medium Enterprises (SME’s) and our services span the full spectrum of all HR relayed business priorities. All our experts are CIPM, CIPD, SPHRI qualified with vast experience of real – life business processes.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Our team of dedicated professionals guarantee efficient, attainable and effective results that will positively transform your business processes internally and externally irrespective of size.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Group Strategy & Risk Management Manager

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports To: GMD
Department: Risk

Job brief


	This position will be responsible for formulating and implementing the company’s strategic policies, risk management and mitigation and system audit and control.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop, execute and manage the system operating plan with the company strategic plan and ensure that goals are achieved.
	Develop innovative risk assessment methodologies to evaluate business risks from external causes and internal exposures and process inefficiencies.
	Create, implement and monitor strategies for risk mitigation in all areas of the business.
	Ensure a uniform and coordinated approach to risk assessments by providing guidance documents and facilitating assessments by business units.
	Facilitate implementation of strategies to address identified risks through development and revisions of policies, procedures and work instructions and by convening and serving on ad hoc and task-specific teams.
	Support business continuity and resilience planning initiatives.
	Oversee the internal control environment and review all independent assurance activity by the auditor.
	Maintain Group-wide risk registers and enterprise risk dashboards.
	Ensure that appropriate metrics are in place to measure performance and ensure that strategic actions are completed at various levels to achieve desired results and objectives.
	Manage and steward the Integrated Opportunity and Risk Management (ORM) program providing regular revisions and updates as necessary.
	Build out and steward the development and management of all operative unit’s business resumption plans.
	Drive a culture of risk awareness, accountability and execution discipline.
	Champion continuous improvement across strategy and risk management practices.
	Responsible for conducting various risk assessments to identify potential threats and weaknesses, and develop contingency plans to address them.


Qualifications /Key competence


	Bachelor’s Degree in Economics, Finance, Business Administration, Accounting, Risk Management or related disciplines
	9+ years of relevant experience in risk management, corporate strategy, consulting, financial services or related environment.
	Master’s degree (MBA or related field) preferred.
	Experience within banking, investment management, asset management or diversified financial services preferred.
	Demonstrated experience in enterprise risk, strategy formulation and performance management.
	Experience preparing executive/board-level reports.


Certifications:


	Global Association of Risk Professionals (FRM)
	Chartered Financial Analyst Institute (CFA – added advantage)
	Relevant governance or strategy certifications are an advantage.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Group Strategy & Risk Management Manager" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Optometrist / Optician",
  "description": "Soteria Eye Clinic is a private enterprise registered in Nigeria as a limited liability company to offer high quality, affordable and accessible comprehensive world class eye care services to our immediate community and environs. Our purpose is to create and deliver first class comprehensive eye care services to ALL in order to &ldquo;Improve Lives through Affordable Quality Eye Care.&rdquo;

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Optometrist / Optician

Job Location:&nbsp;Chevron Drive, Lekki - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilties


	Conduct eye examinations to assess vision and detect abnormalities
	Perform vision tests using specialized equipment
	Diagnose refractive errors (e.g., nearsightedness, farsightedness, astigmatism)
	Detect early signs of eye diseases such as glaucoma, cataracts, and macular degeneration
	Prescribe eyeglasses and contact lenses
	Fit and adjust lenses according to patient needs
	Provide guidance on proper lens care and usage.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor`s / Master`s Degree with 5 - 10 years of experience.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment20207@gmail.com&nbsp;or&nbsp;hrofficer@soteriaeyeclinic.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Optometrist / Optician Job at Soteria Eye Clinic




        
    

        
        Soteria Eye Clinic is a private enterprise registered in Nigeria as a limited liability company to offer high quality, affordable and accessible comprehensive world class eye care services to our immediate community and environs. Our purpose is to create and deliver first class comprehensive eye care services to ALL in order to “Improve Lives through Affordable Quality Eye Care.”

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Optometrist / Optician

Job Location: Chevron Drive, Lekki - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilties
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Conduct eye examinations to assess vision and detect abnormalities
	Perform vision tests using specialized equipment
	Diagnose refractive errors (e.g., nearsightedness, farsightedness, astigmatism)
	Detect early signs of eye diseases such as glaucoma, cataracts, and macular degeneration
	Prescribe eyeglasses and contact lenses
	Fit and adjust lenses according to patient needs
	Provide guidance on proper lens care and usage.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor`s / Master`s Degree with 5 - 10 years of experience.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] or [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "HR Officer",
  "description": "Runlink Technology Limited is a global tech brand powering business growth across EMEA (Europe, Middle East &amp; Africa). We specialize in premium, durable data cables and mobile accessories, designed to meet the unique needs of mobile repair shops and wholesalers worldwide. With strategic hubs in Shenzhen, Dubai, and Lagos, Nigeria, we combine global supply chain excellence with local market expertise. Our trusted banking and logistics network in Nigeria ensures seamless operations, while our EMEA-wide vision positions us as a leader in the industry. We don&rsquo;t just sell cables&mdash;we empower your success. We grow only when you grow.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full Time

Job Responsibilities


	Manage daily HR routine work, staff attendance and employee profile files
	Complete full cycle recruitment, resume screening, interview arrangement and employee onboarding
	Assist and prepare for headhunting and high-end talent sourcing business
	Collect local candidate resources and build up company talent pool
	Follow up mid and senior level candidates and maintain long-term talent connection
	Cooperate with talent background check and recruitment arrangement
	Keep all company business and talent information strictly confidential


Job Requirements


	1-3 years of working experience in Nigeria local HR field
	Candidates with headhunting or talent sourcing experience are highly preferred
	Candidate who can speak both English and Chinese language is highly preferred
	Familiar with Lagos local job market and recruitment channels
	Honest, careful, reliable, strong communication and execution skills
	Full time on site, strictly follow company rules and red line policy.


Salary
N160,000 - N260,000 per month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CV&nbsp; to:&nbsp;info@runlink.tech&nbsp;usingthe Job Position as the subject of the email.

HR Officer Job at Runlink Technology Limited




        
    

        
        Runlink Technology Limited is a global tech brand powering business growth across EMEA (Europe, Middle East & Africa). We specialize in premium, durable data cables and mobile accessories, designed to meet the unique needs of mobile repair shops and wholesalers worldwide. With strategic hubs in Shenzhen, Dubai, and Lagos, Nigeria, we combine global supply chain excellence with local market expertise. Our trusted banking and logistics network in Nigeria ensures seamless operations, while our EMEA-wide vision positions us as a leader in the industry. We don’t just sell cables—we empower your success. We grow only when you grow.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Officer
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full Time

Job Responsibilities


	Manage daily HR routine work, staff attendance and employee profile files
	Complete full cycle recruitment, resume screening, interview arrangement and employee onboarding
	Assist and prepare for headhunting and high-end talent sourcing business
	Collect local candidate resources and build up company talent pool
	Follow up mid and senior level candidates and maintain long-term talent connection
	Cooperate with talent background check and recruitment arrangement
	Keep all company business and talent information strictly confidential


Job Requirements


	1-3 years of working experience in Nigeria local HR field
	Candidates with headhunting or talent sourcing experience are highly preferred
	Candidate who can speak both English and Chinese language is highly preferred
	Familiar with Lagos local job market and recruitment channels
	Honest, careful, reliable, strong communication and execution skills
	Full time on site, strictly follow company rules and red line policy.


Salary
N160,000 - N260,000 per month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CV  to: [email protected] usingthe Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted qualified candidates will be contacted.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Front Office Manager",
  "description": "The Jagz Ibadan Hotel is a luxurious 4star hotel committed to delivering exceptional personalized services. Our Vision at The JAGZ is to be the BEST BRAND Hotel in Nigeria and across the globe. How do we achieve this? Our Mission: We provide our services in a helpful, serene, fun environment. These services reflect our core values of care, warmth, comfort and excellence. Our goal at The Jagz Ibadan is to take care of our guest as individuals, and ensure they have a memorable Jagz experience, which will ensure loyalty to our hotel. We treat our guests as family and friends, and strive to continually exceed their expectations. On stage, we love to serve, and make each experience memorable.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;&nbsp;Front Office Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	As the Front office Manager, you will oversee the front desk operations, lead the front desk team, and ensure exceptional customer service. Manage room inventory, maximize occupancy, and maintain high levels of guest satisfaction.


Core Responsibilities


	Guest Experience Ensure seamless check-in/check-out experience. Deliver personalized VIP treatment to CEOs, diplomats, expatriates, celebrities, and repeat guests. Manage guest complaints swiftly with service recovery solutions. Maintain premium arrival experience.
	Department Supervision Manage and supervise: Reception Guest Relations Concierge Bell Desk Reservations Switchboard Airport Transfers Night Audit
	Room Inventory Control Optimize room allocation daily. Coordinate room readiness with Housekeeping. Handle overbookings professionally. Manage long-stay guests and premium suites.


Market Sales &amp; Revenue Responsibilities:


	Corporate Market Penetration Drive room sales from: Oil &amp; Gas companies Banks Fintech companies Telecom firms Government agencies Foreign embassies Airlines NGOs Event organizers Production companies
	Direct Revenue Generation Upsell premium rooms and suites. Sell airport transfers. Sell early check-in / late check-out. Sell romantic packages / weekend packages. Convert walk-ins at premium rates.
	Repeat Guest Strategy Build loyalty database. Recover lost corporate accounts. Maintain relationships with executive assistants and travel bookers.


Sales &amp; Marketing Duties:


	Local Market Visibility Work with Sales &amp; Marketing team to promote: Staycation offers Weekend packages Public holiday promotions Ileya packages Christmas packages Valentine packages Children&rsquo;s Day family packages Wedding accommodation offers
	Digital Presence Monitor Google reviews. Monitor social media feedback. Encourage satisfied guests to leave reviews. Improve online ranking against competitors.


Financial Management:


	Increase ADR (Average Daily Rate)
	Improve occupancy % Improve RevPAR
	Reduce no-show losses
	Reduce OTA dependency Control front office payroll
	Eliminate billing errors
	Ensure proper deposit collection


Security / Compliance:


	Ensure NDLEA / Police / immigration sensitive guest handling where required. Proper guest identification procedures.
	Security awareness for VIP guests.
	Fraud prevention on card payments.
	Confidentiality compliance.


Required Qualifications


	Education: BSc / HND in Hospitality, Marketing, Business Admin or related field.
	Experience: 5+ years in hotel operations. 3+ years supervisory role. Must understand Lagos hospitality market. Must have room sales exposure.
	Preferred Background: Worked in hotels such as: International brands premium hotels Conference/business hotels


Key Skills:


	Opera PMS / IDS / Fidelio
	Corporate sales ability
	Revenue management
	Complaint resolution
	Team leadership
	Strong networking skills
	Strong communication
	Smart appearance
	High pressure tolerance.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and application to:&nbsp;career@thejagzhotel.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.&nbsp;",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-02",
  "validThrough": "2026-06-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "The Jagz Ibadan Hotel"
    
  },

    "@type": "Place",

      "@type": "PostalAddress",

    }

    }
  }
}



Front Office Manager Job at the Jagz Ibadan Hotel




        
    

        
        The Jagz Ibadan Hotel is a luxurious 4star hotel committed to delivering exceptional personalized services. Our Vision at The JAGZ is to be the BEST BRAND Hotel in Nigeria and across the globe. How do we achieve this? Our Mission: We provide our services in a helpful, serene, fun environment. These services reflect our core values of care, warmth, comfort and excellence. Our goal at The Jagz Ibadan is to take care of our guest as individuals, and ensure they have a memorable Jagz experience, which will ensure loyalty to our hotel. We treat our guests as family and friends, and strive to continually exceed their expectations. On stage, we love to serve, and make each experience memorable.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:  Front Office Manager

Job Location: Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	As the Front office Manager, you will oversee the front desk operations, lead the front desk team, and ensure exceptional customer service. Manage room inventory, maximize occupancy, and maintain high levels of guest satisfaction.


Core Responsibilities


	Guest Experience Ensure seamless check-in/check-out experience. Deliver personalized VIP treatment to CEOs, diplomats, expatriates, celebrities, and repeat guests. Manage guest complaints swiftly with service recovery solutions. Maintain premium arrival experience.
	Department Supervision Manage and supervise: Reception Guest Relations Concierge Bell Desk Reservations Switchboard Airport Transfers Night Audit
	Room Inventory Control Optimize room allocation daily. Coordinate room readiness with Housekeeping. Handle overbookings professionally. Manage long-stay guests and premium suites.


Market Sales & Revenue Responsibilities:


	Corporate Market Penetration Drive room sales from: Oil & Gas companies Banks Fintech companies Telecom firms Government agencies Foreign embassies Airlines NGOs Event organizers Production companies
	Direct Revenue Generation Upsell premium rooms and suites. Sell airport transfers. Sell early check-in / late check-out. Sell romantic packages / weekend packages. Convert walk-ins at premium rates.
	Repeat Guest Strategy Build loyalty database. Recover lost corporate accounts. Maintain relationships with executive assistants and travel bookers.


Sales & Marketing Duties:


	Local Market Visibility Work with Sales & Marketing team to promote: Staycation offers Weekend packages Public holiday promotions Ileya packages Christmas packages Valentine packages Children’s Day family packages Wedding accommodation offers
	Digital Presence Monitor Google reviews. Monitor social media feedback. Encourage satisfied guests to leave reviews. Improve online ranking against competitors.


Financial Management:


	Increase ADR (Average Daily Rate)
	Improve occupancy % Improve RevPAR
	Reduce no-show losses
	Reduce OTA dependency Control front office payroll
	Eliminate billing errors
	Ensure proper deposit collection


Security / Compliance:


	Ensure NDLEA / Police / immigration sensitive guest handling where required. Proper guest identification procedures.
	Security awareness for VIP guests.
	Fraud prevention on card payments.
	Confidentiality compliance.


Required Qualifications


	Education: BSc / HND in Hospitality, Marketing, Business Admin or related field.
	Experience: 5+ years in hotel operations. 3+ years supervisory role. Must understand Lagos hospitality market. Must have room sales exposure.
	Preferred Background: Worked in hotels such as: International brands premium hotels Conference/business hotels


Key Skills:


	Opera PMS / IDS / Fidelio
	Corporate sales ability
	Revenue management
	Complaint resolution
	Team leadership
	Strong networking skills
	Strong communication
	Smart appearance
	High pressure tolerance.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and application to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.     

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "OOPL Foundation is&nbsp;preserving the past, capturing the present, and inspiring the future.&nbsp;Our Organisation, a world-class multi-complex comprising a Presidential Library, Museum, Resort, Youth Centre, and Conference Facilities located in Abeokuta, Ogun State.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Energy Manager
Job Location:&nbsp;Abeokuta, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary&nbsp;


	We seeks to engage a highly competent and experienced Energy Manager.


Responsibilities


	Responsible for developing, implementing, and monitoring strategies to optimize energy usage, reduce operational costs, and drive sustainability across all our facilities.
	Lead our transition to cleaner energy while ensuring uninterrupted power supply for critical operations and events.
	Conduct comprehensive energy audits and analyze consumption patterns across OOPL facilities.
	Develop and implement energy conservation and cost-reduction initiatives to achieve measurable savings.
	Oversee the operation and maintenance of generators, HVAC systems, chillers, and renewable energy installations.
	Manage and lead solar/inverter projects and manage relationships with utility providers including IBEDC
	Ensure compliance with national energy regulations, NESREA guidelines, and ISO 50001 standards
	Prepare monthly energy performance reports and budget forecasts data for Management.
	Train staff on energy efficiency practices and develop SOPs for energy management


Requirements


	B.Eng in Electrical, Mechanical, or Energy Engineering. Professional certification
	COREN registration mandatory. CEM &ndash; Certified Energy Manager is a strong advantage
	Minimum of 7 years relevant experience in energy management, preferably in large organisation
	Sound knowledge of Nigerian Electricity Regulatory Commission codes and energy efficiency laws.
	Strong analytical and data interpretation skills with proficiency in Excel and energy monitoring tools
	Excellent project management and vendor negotiation skills
	Ability to work under pressure during major events and resolve power-related issues promptly.
	High level of integrity, innovation, and attention to detail.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV &amp; application letter to:&nbsp;hr@oopl.org.ng&nbsp;using &quot;ENERGY MANAGER&quot; as the subject of the email.

Energy Manager Job at OOPL Foundation




        
    

        
        OOPL Foundation is preserving the past, capturing the present, and inspiring the future. Our Organisation, a world-class multi-complex comprising a Presidential Library, Museum, Resort, Youth Centre, and Conference Facilities located in Abeokuta, Ogun State.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Energy Manager
Job Location: Abeokuta, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary 


	We seeks to engage a highly competent and experienced Energy Manager.


Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Responsible for developing, implementing, and monitoring strategies to optimize energy usage, reduce operational costs, and drive sustainability across all our facilities.
	Lead our transition to cleaner energy while ensuring uninterrupted power supply for critical operations and events.
	Conduct comprehensive energy audits and analyze consumption patterns across OOPL facilities.
	Develop and implement energy conservation and cost-reduction initiatives to achieve measurable savings.
	Oversee the operation and maintenance of generators, HVAC systems, chillers, and renewable energy installations.
	Manage and lead solar/inverter projects and manage relationships with utility providers including IBEDC
	Ensure compliance with national energy regulations, NESREA guidelines, and ISO 50001 standards
	Prepare monthly energy performance reports and budget forecasts data for Management.
	Train staff on energy efficiency practices and develop SOPs for energy management


Requirements


	B.Eng in Electrical, Mechanical, or Energy Engineering. Professional certification
	COREN registration mandatory. CEM – Certified Energy Manager is a strong advantage
	Minimum of 7 years relevant experience in energy management, preferably in large organisation
	Sound knowledge of Nigerian Electricity Regulatory Commission codes and energy efficiency laws.
	Strong analytical and data interpretation skills with proficiency in Excel and energy monitoring tools
	Excellent project management and vendor negotiation skills
	Ability to work under pressure during major events and resolve power-related issues promptly.
	High level of integrity, innovation, and attention to detail.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV & application letter to: [email protected] using "ENERGY MANAGER" as the subject of the email.

Note: We offer competitive remuneration package commensurate with experience.
